titleStmt.title: SII 29.314: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 314. (A.R. No. B. 498 of 1961-62.) ŚRINGĒRI, SRINGERI TALUK, CHICKMAGALUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in front of the samādhi-guḍi behind the Vidyaśankara temple.

The record has expressed salutations to pontiffs Vidyātīrtha and Vidyaraṇya at the beginning. It registers the gifts of garden and wet lands in Heggadde situated within Keḷanādu belonging to Śringeri matha as Sarvamānya agrahāra named Narasimhapura to all the mahājanas of various gōtras and sūtras who were residing in the Vaśisṭhāśrama on the bank of the river Tungabhadra, also referred to as paśchima-vāhini, by the pontiff of Śringeri, Śri Narasimhabhārati, disciple of Śri Narasimha-bhārati as an act of pleasing the god Narasimhēśvara. The record contains details of the shares and names of donees. The gifted gardens contained 5500 areca trees planted by Appaṇa and Śankaralinga and the wet lands yielded 500 khanḍuga of Paddy.
The record is dated Śaka 1525, Śōbhakṟit, Bhādrapada Śu. 10, Sunday which corresponds to 1603 A.D., September 4.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇēśa śāradā gurubhyō namaḥ . cidchana Ēkō vyāpīnityaḥ sa(ta)
tatōditaḥ prabhuśāṁtaḥ jayati jagadēka bījaṁ sarvānugrāhakaḥ śaṁbhuḥ . yasya viśva
sitaṁ vēdāyō vēdēbhyōkhilaṁ jagat . nirmamētamahaṁ vaṁdē vidyātīrtha mahēśvaraṁ . Avidyā
dhvāṁta saṁdōha vidaraṇa paṭīyasīṁ . vidyāraṇya gurōḥ śrīmat pādukāṁ praṇamāmyahaṁ . vipsā sa
tyavatīsutasya vibudhācāryasya vēṣāṁtaraṁ paryāyaḥ paramēṣṭhinaḥ phaṇabhṛtāṁ prēṣṭasya rūpāṁtaraṁ . pratyāvṛtti rapi
prabhākara gūrōrbhūyōjaniḥ pāṇinēḥ śṛṁgēri narasiṁhabhārati guruḥ sōyaṁ samujjṛṁbhatē . harērllīlāvarā
hasya daṁṣṭrādaṁḍaḥ sapātuvaḥ . hēmādri kalaśā yatra dhātrī chatra śrīyaṁ dadhau . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhaśa
kavaru(r)ṣa 1525 saṁdu vartamāna śōbhakṛtsaṁvatsarada bhādrapada śuddha 10 Ādivāradalu śrī matpara
mahaṁsa parivrājakācāryavarya padavākyapramāṇa pārāvārapārīṇa yamaniyamādhyaṣṭāṁga yōgani
ratarāda siṁgēriya śrī narasiṁha bhārati svāmigaḷa śrī caraṇāraviṁdada śiṣyaru śrī narasiṁ
habhārati svāmigaḷu naṁma śrī gurucaraṇarāda śrī nṛsiṁhēśvara dēvara prītyarthavāgi śrī narasiṁhapura nāmadēya
diṁda paścima vāhiniyāda tuṁgabhadrātīra vasiṣṭāśramadalli nānā gōtra sūtrada Aśēṣa vidvanmahājanaṁ
gaḷige koṭṭa sarvamānyagrahārada dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma siṁgēriya śrī maṭhake saluva
keḷanāḍoḷagaṇa heggaddeya grāmadoḷage kereyavottuviḍidu Appaṇa śaṁkaraliṁganavaru māḍuva Aiduvare sāvi
ra Aḍakeya marada kṣētra Adake saluva sarvasvāmyasahitavāgiyū keḷanāḍoḷagaṇa heddase pāloḷage
Aṁjanada boṁmaṇanavaru terruva gaḍiya bhattadoḷage bhattakhaṁḍuga 200 hāretāḷa saṁṇaṇa terruva bhattadoḷage
khaṁ 50 teraṇidatippa terruva bhattadoḷage khaṁ 110 haṁdigōḍa jakkaṇana pālinali teruva bhattadoḷage
khaṁ 40 haravariya kōṭṭiyaṇana pālaliterruva bhatta khaṁ 80 Aṁtu bhatta khaṁ 400 nū Ā nṛsiṁ
hapurada dēvasthānagaḷige vṛtti 1 kke khaṁ 40 ra lekkadali Aḍikē mara 300 rra lekkadali vṛtti 3
Ā mahājanaṁgaḷige vṛtti 1 kke bhatta khaṁ 24 Aḍikē mara 300 ra lekkadali vṛtti 15 Ubhayaṁ
vṛtti 18kke vṛtti kalpaneya mahājanaṁgaḷa vivara . Ā nṛsiṁhēśvara dēvarige haravariyakōṭṭe
yaṇana pālalu bhatta khaṁ 40 heggaddeya tōṭadalli Aḍakē mara 400 Ā sarvvēśvara dēvarige

haravariyalu bhatta khaṁ 40 heggaddeyalu Aḍikemara 300 Ā maṭhada sā(nā)rasiṁhya dēvarige jakkaṇana pālalu bhatta khaṁ
40 heggaddeyalu mara 300 Aṁtu dēvasthānakke bhatta khaṁ 120 Aḍikemara 1000 Ā mahājanaṁgaḷige kauṁḍi
nya gōtrada yajuśśākheya Āpastaṁbha sūtrada tirumala bhaṭṭara makkaḷu nāgadēva bhaṭṭarige heddaseya Aṁjana
da boṁmaṇanalu bhatta khaṁ 24 heggaddeyalu Aḍakeya mara 300 jāvada jñāvatsagōtrada yajuḥ śākheya Ā
Āpastaṁbha sūtrada nārāyaṇabhaṭṭarra makkaḷu cauḍibhaṭṭarige heddaseya boṁmaṇanalli bhatta khaṁ 24 hegga
ddeyalli Aḍakemara 300 bādarāyaṇa gōtrada yajuḥ śākheya Āpastaṁba sūtrada rāmacaṁdra bhaṭṭara ma
kkaḷu dēvaru bhaṭṭarige heddaseya bhatta khaṁ 24 heggaddeyalli Aḍake mara 300 kāśyapa
gōtrada mādhyaṁdina śākheya kātyāyana sūtrada dēvaṇa jyotiṣara makkaḷu śaṁkaranārāyaṇa jyōti
ṣarige heddaseya bommaṇanalli bhatta khaṁ 24 heggaddeyali Aḍakeya mara 300 bhāradvāja
gōtrada rṛk śākheya Āśvalāyana sūtrada voḍeyaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu Adhyāpaka śaṁkaranārā
yaṇa bhaṭṭarige heddaseya boṁmaṇanalli bhatta khaṁ 24 heggaddeyali Aḍakeya mara 300 haritagō
trada yajuśśākheya Āpastaṁba sūtrada tirumalabhaṭṭara makkaḷu Adhyāpaka tirumalabhaṭṭarige
heddase boṁmaṇanali bhatta khaṁ 24 heggaddeyalū Aḍakēmara 300 vāsiṣṭa gōtrada yajuḥ śākheya hi
raṁṇya kēśī sūtrada mahādēvabhaṭṭara makkaḷu purāṇika kanakēśvarabhaṭṭarige heddaseya boṁmaṇanali bhatta khaṁ
ḍu 24 heggaddeyali Aḍakēmara 300 haritagōtrada rṛk śākheya Āśvalāyana sūtrada
viśvanāthabhaṭṭara makkaḷu subrahmaṇya vāraṇāsigaḷige heddaseya boṁmaṇanali bhatta khaṁ 24
heggaddeyali Aḍakēmara 300 viṣṇuvardhanagōtrada yajuḥ śākheya Āpastaṁba sūtrada gītā bhaṭṭara
makkaḷu kāmadēvabhaṭṭarige heddaseya boṁmaṇanali bhatta khaṁ 8 teraṇada tippanali bhatta khaṁ 16 Ubha
yaṁ khaṁ 24 heggaddeyali Aḍakēmara 300 vasiṣṭha gōtrada rṛk śākheya Āśvanālayana sūtrada nāra
siṁhabhaṭṭara makkaḷu śēṣādribhaṭṭarige teraṇada tippanali bhatta khaṁ 24 heggadde
yali Aḍakeyamara 300 pārāśara gōtrada ®k śākheya Āśvalāyana sūtrada rāmā
paṁḍitara makkaḷu padmāji paṁḍitarige teraṇada tippanali bhatta khaṁ 24 heggaddeyali Aḍike
yamara 300 kāsyapagōtrada rṛk śākheya Āśvalāyanasūtrada viśvanāthabhaṭṭara makka
ḷu kāśī nīlakaṁṭhabhaṭṭarige teraṇada tippanali bhatta khaṁ 24 heggaddēli Aḍakē mara 300
keṁḍinya gōtrada rṛk śākheya Āśvalāyana sūtrada bhāskarabhaṭṭara makkaḷu mallabhaṭṭarige

teraṇada tippanali bhatta khaṁ 22 hāratāḷa saṁṇaṇanali bhattakhaṁ 2 Ubhayaṁ 24 heggaddēli
Aḍakē mara 300 gautamagōtrada yajuḥ śākheya Āpastaṁbasūtrada subrahmaṇyabhaṭṭara makkaḷu
brahmaṇya bhaṭṭarige hāratāḷa saṁṇaṇanali bhatta khaṁ 24 heggaddeyali Aḍakē mara 300 bhāra
dvāja gōtrada yajuḥ śākheya Āpastaṁba sūtrada hariharabhaṭṭara makkaḷu nārasiṁhabhaṭṭarige
hāratāḷa saṁṇaṇanali bhattakhaṁ 24 heggaddeyalli Aḍakemara 300 paṁcakārukara saṁmaṁdha
ke teraṇada tippanali bhatta khaṁ 20 Aṁtu Aḍakemara 5500 nū bhatta khaṁḍaga 500 nū koṭṭevu .
Ādityacaṁdrāvanilōnalaścadyaurbhūmirāpōhṛdayaṁ yamaśca . Ahaśca rātriśca Ubhēca saṁdhyē
dharmaśca jānāti narasya vṛttaṁ . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānātsvarga mavā
pnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . śrī vidyāśaṁkaraḥ . śubhamastu śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī
Digital edition of SII 29.314 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
